headline: Jim Cramer on Take-Two Interactive: “I Wouldn’t Buy It All at Once; It’s an Erratic Trader”
summary: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. (NASDAQ:TTWO) was among the stocks on which Jim Cramer gave his opinion, as he warned that increased AI-related spending might cause near-term headwind for stocks. Inquiring about the stock, a caller mentioned they started a position because they are a gamer and expressed excitement about the upcoming GTA VI. Cramer replied: […]
